query: SELECT abbrev, vsinName, ncaaName FROM ncaam_teams WHERE abbrev IN ('DUKE', 'UNC', 'GONZ', 'LBSU', 'HAW', 'DART', 'PSU2', 'CSU2', 'SDSU2', 'MER2', 'WSU2', 'USD2') ORDER BY abbrev;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT abbrev, vsinName, ncaaName FROM ncaam_teams WHERE abbrev IN ('DUKE', 'UNC', 'GONZ', 'LBSU', 'HAW', 'DART', 'PSU2', 'CSU2', 'SDSU2', 'MER2', 'WSU2', 'USD2') ORDER BY abbrev;
